project_type: Single-file HTML electrical engineering calculation platform
build_system: None - single HTML file, zero external dependencies
test_framework: Node.js test runner (test-sld.js) using eval + assert, 2021 tests
verification_instructions: Run `node test-sld.js` and confirm all 2021+ tests pass. Stage only el-dimensionering.html + test-sld.js by name.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - single HTML file with no dependencies
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET. Single-file constraint: no external libraries/assets. Zero external CDN. Inline SVG only. 100% click-only (no text inputs except 3 pre-existing AI fields). Danish/English bilingual via tx() function.
contribution_requirements: Stage ONLY el-dimensionering.html + test-sld.js. Push to branch feat/smart-circuit-simulators. All strings use tx('Dansk','English'). Life-safety conservative (cite DS-HD 60364 clauses). Mathcad Prime mathematical style for calculations.
key_patterns: 1. sel-btn/select-grid/select-group pattern for all button selectors. 2. eng-cards/eng-card for visual card selectors. 3. eng-advanced <details> for collapsible advanced panels. 4. depth-2/depth-3/advanced-only CSS classes for user-mode-based hiding (body.mode-X). 5. engReasoning() for 3-layer progressive disclosure. 6. mcPrimeLine()/mcPrimeDefLine() for Mathcad-style calculations. 7. valStep()/valSelect() for click-only numeric steppers. 8. renderModule(mod) re-renders the active module. 9. State objects (loadState, cableState, mcbState, etc.) hold selections. 10. renderLoad() is the model module with smart cards + presets + depth classes.
relevant_files: el-dimensionering.html (lines 8267-8470: renderLoad - MODEL module with progressive disclosure)
directory_structure: Single-file app: el-dimensionering.html (~45000 lines) contains all HTML, CSS, and JS. test-sld.js is the test file. .agents/tasks/ holds task state.
